Data Scientist 2022 – 2023 · Product Platform
Recommendation & NLP Systems

Hybrid recommendation system — ALS collaborative filtering, TF-IDF content-based NLP, and a LightGBM ranker — personalising the student homepage for 40,000+ UPSC aspirants. Five A/B experiments. +34% CTR lift. The production ML foundation built before the AI engineering work.
